name: hdt-platform
description: Mobile-first web application for registering users, Human Digital Twins, Vehicle Digital Twins, and HDT deployments.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @hdt/shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w @hdt/api" "npm run dev -w @hdt/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hdt/shared && npm run build -w @hdt/api && npm run build -w @hdt/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @hdt/shared && npm run test -w @hdt/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @hdt/shared && npm run typecheck -w @hdt/shared && npm run typecheck -w @hdt/api && npm run typecheck -w @hdt/web
